channel.title: +Martin Paul on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Martin Paul on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Fukushima samurai
item.description:
Source: TW

Samurai Spirit of Fukushima: The Shonentai Youth Corps of Nihonmatsu Castle

(First of 3 Parts)

At the end of the Edo period (1600-1868), Japan was in turmoil. There had been over 260 of rule by the Tokugawa Shogunate, while the emperor remained merely a figurehead.

The feudal system had become outdated. The general populace, along with lower class samurai, had become disgruntled with a system that seemed to provide for a warrior class that gave little in return.
